The Haradrim boats and supply caches are near the mouth of the River Erui in Lossarnach. Now that you have discovered the landing area, you should bur…
Dagor can be found in Arnach, near the keep. You should return to Dagor and tell him how you destroyed the enemy's boats and supplies.
